name: Apricot Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1 Can unpeeled apricot halves (29 oz.), thoroughly drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Dry apricot halves on paper towels until completely dry.
2. Beat egg with milk; stir in melted Crisco. Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Add to egg mixture and stir until mixed.
3. Dip apricots in batter; fry a few at a time, in deep Crisco heated to 365°F (185°C) until fritters are brown, about 4 minutes, turning once. Do not use the frying basket.
4. Drain on paper towels. Roll in confectioners' sugar. Serve warm.
